violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of support beams and counter in the 3-bay sink area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The Person in charge was not knowledgeable of (labeling requirements and repackaging of foods requirements). The person in charge must demonstrate to the health department knowledge of foodborne disease prevention, application of HACCP principles, and the requirements of this Code. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025
The food prep area is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

Inspectors observed an ROP machine and ROP foods. Facility is using ROP to package various food items. PIC informed to obtain approval for specialized processes and cease practices. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

Fish, peppers, etc. packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
The facility is lacking a 3 bay sink to adequately wash, rinse and sanitize equipment and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
